tasks.label: Sphinx Make
tasks.command: python3 ${workspaceFolder}/src/portfolio/generate_website.py; cd ${workspaceFolder}/docs; make html; firefox build/html/index.html

tasks.label: Create Docx
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder}; python3 src/portfolio/portfolio.py; soffice formatted_document.docx; rm formatted_document.docx
